name: big
description: USA macroeconomic dataset for the Student-t DFM (First Stage) — 50 series (49 monthly + 1 quarterly). EXTENDED configuration: 20 'small' baseline series + 18 additional FRED-MD series + 9 FRED-direct 'current' series + 3 constructed spreads. This JSON is the single source of truth for the series set, blocks, frequencies, transform codes and column order.

notes.source: fredmd = sourced from FRED-MD with the FRED-MD transformation code; current = sourced from FRED direct / processed dataset (not in FRED-MD vintages); spread = CONSTRUCTED in data_loader as components[0]-components[1] on the RAW LEVELS of two FRED-MD series, then the spread's own transform is applied. NOTE: data_loader derives the current set from the per-series 'source' field; this 'current_series' key is documentation only.
notes.spreads: 3 constructed spreads (block=financial, transform 1=LEVEL): term_spread=GS10-TB3MS (curve slope), baa_spread=BAA-GS10 (Baa credit premium), aaa_spread=AAA-GS10 (Aaa credit premium). Computed on RAW rate levels (not the t2-differenced component series). Rationale for t1: components are I(1) (enter the model in t2), but a rate spread is their stationary cointegrating combination I(0), so it is kept in level; differencing it (t2) would over-difference. NaN only where a component level is NaN.
notes.current_series_detail: 9 FRED-direct current series: REAL JTSJOL(t5,~2000) RRSFS(t5,~1992); FINANCIAL GS2(t2) ANFCI(t1,weekly); OTHER CPILFESL(t6 core CPI) PCEPILFE(t6 core PCE) IR(t6 import px) IQ(t6 export px) T10YIE(t2 breakeven,~2003 daily). Generic fetcher = monthly mean of native freq, then transform. NOTE: 6 originally-considered current series (ISM NAPM/NAPMNOI/NAPMEI & ISMNONMAN, Russell RU2000PR, NFIB NFIBBUSOPT) are proprietary and not hosted on FRED — not included.
notes.transform_codes: FRED-MD codes: 1=level, 2=first diff, 3=2nd diff, 4=log, 5=log first diff, 6=log 2nd diff, 7=pct change. For 'current' series transform is null: NFCI is kept as level (weekly -> monthly mean); GDPC1 is log-diff x 100 at quarter-end (handled by download_gdpc1).
notes.order: The order of the 'series' array IS the canonical column order (ORDERED_COLS): real block (FRED-MD then current), then financial block (FRED-MD, then current incl. NFCI, then constructed spreads), then other block (FRED-MD then current), then GDPC1 (real/current/quarterly) last.
notes.vix_alias: VIXCLSx in older vintages was named VXOCLSx (definitional break ~2021-12, VXO vs VIX). For data_loader (in-sample, CURRENT FRED-MD file) only VIXCLSx exists, so use VIXCLSx. The historical-vintage alias is handled later in data_import (vintage step), not here.
notes.fredmd_added_over_small: 18 FRED-MD series added on top of the 20 'small' baseline: REAL = IPCONGD, IPDCONGD, IPBUSEQ, CUMFNS, AMDMNOx, ANDENOx, UNRATE, AWHMAN, CES0600000007, HOUST, PERMIT; FINANCIAL = TB3MS, GS5, GS10, BAA, AAA, VIXCLSx; OTHER = WPSFD49207 (PPI proxy).
